title: Advanced Pod Configuration — Container-level security context
text:
You can specify the security context just for a specific container.
Here's an example:
apiVersion
:
v1
kind
:
Pod
metadata
:
name
:
security-context-demo-2
spec
:
containers
:
-
name
:
sec-ctx-demo-2
image
:
gcr.io/google-samples/node-hello:1.0
securityContext
:
allowPrivilegeEscalation
:
false
runAsNonRoot
:
true
runAsUser
:
1000
capabilities
:
drop
:
-
ALL
seccompProfile
:
type
:
RuntimeDefault
